channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Janu Verma
item.description: Janu Verma Author of Incomplete Distillation, a Substack newsletter covering machine learning, recommendation systems, and retrieval.

item.title: TIGER
item.description: TIGER TIGER (Transformer Index for GEnerative Recommenders; Rajput et al., Google, 2023 — “Recommender Systems with Generative Retrieval”, arXiv:2305.05065) applies Generative Retrieval to recommendation.

item.title: Differentiable Search Index
item.description: Differentiable Search Index DSI (Tay et al., Google, 2022 — “Transformer Memory as a Differentiable Search Index”) is the seminal formulation of Generative Retrieval for document search.

item.title: Generative Retrieval
item.description: Generative Retrieval A retrieval paradigm in which a single sequence model generates the identifier of the target item or document directly from the query, rather than embedding the query and scoring it against a separately-indexed corpus.

item.title: RQ-VAE
item.description: RQ-VAE Residual-Quantized Variational Autoencoder — an autoencoder whose discrete bottleneck is a stack of vector-quantization codebooks applied to successive residuals.

item.title: Semantic IDs
item.description: Semantic IDs A semantic ID is a short sequence of discrete codes — derived from an item’s or document’s content embedding — that replaces the arbitrary atomic identifier (e.g.

item.title: Steering Vectors
item.description: Steering Vectors A direction in a model’s activation space that, when added to the hidden states at inference time, shifts the model’s behavior toward (or away from) a target attribute — tone, refusal, a topic, a style.

item.title: Concept Vectors
item.description: Concept Vectors A direction in a model’s representation (embedding or activation) space that corresponds to a human-interpretable concept.

item.title: Compositional Embeddings
item.description: Compositional Embeddings Embedding approaches in which the representation of a complex object is built by combining the representations of its parts under well-defined operations, rather than learned as an opaque whole.
